Notes: * Kean leads all-time series, 45-10. NJCU snaps Kean 8-game series win streak.
* Game does not count as an NJAC game during 2012-13 season (administrative
* First home win over Kean since 2/17/1999. First win vs. Kean since 2/4/2006.
Game.Location: Jersey City, NJ (John J. Moore AFC)
Game.Officials: Carlos Guzman,  Pat Musto,  Jessica Burch
